info.name: Patient Service Tests
info.description: Collection for testing the Patient Service through the complete flow: API Gateway > Auth > Apollo Federation Gateway > Microservices > Google Healthcare API

item.name: 1. Authentication

exec: console.log("Token saved to collection variable: auth_token");

request.description: Get an authentication token from the Auth Service through the API Gateway

item.description: Authentication requests to get and verify tokens

item.name: 2. GraphQL Queries

request.description: Get patients through the API Gateway > Auth > Apollo Federation > Patient Service flow
Get a specific patient by ID through the API Gateway
Get patients by practitioner ID through the API Gateway

item.description: GraphQL queries to test the Patient Service through the API Gateway

item.name: 3. GraphQL Mutations

exec: console.log("Patient ID saved to collection variable: patient_id");
console.log("No patient ID found in response");

request.description: Create a new patient through the API Gateway
Update an existing patient through the API Gateway
Delete a patient through the API Gateway

item.description: GraphQL mutations to test the Patient Service through the API Gateway

item.name: 4. Direct Federation Tests

request.description: Get the federation schema directly from the Apollo Federation Gateway
Test entity reference resolution directly through the Apollo Federation Gateway
Check the health of the Apollo Federation Gateway and its services

item.description: Tests for the Apollo Federation Gateway directly
